full_text:
**Dec 16th 2024**

- First we started discussion about if it would be possible to get
 > results by April.

 - The collaborators do not have enough experience with MHCII

 - With the company (Valo therapeutics) the results take a bit
 > longer, but they have experience with MHCII. [We need to make
 > a collaboration agreement]{.underline}. Viccenzo lab can do
 > the contract.

 - We could get results maybe by the end of March.

 - Cell suspension or frozen tissue is good. The gold standard is
 > 1g of tissue.

 - Funding discussion

 - Jacopo could also do exploration of MHCI

 - Please contact Valio therapeutics

 - Espectra
